app.name: COMPANION Care
app.demoBanner: Synthetic data only — do not enter real personal health information.

demo.banner: Demo · sample data for Rosa Herrera

chooser.title: Are you the person with a diagnosis, or a caregiver?
chooser.subtitle: No sign-up. Everything you see is synthetic data for Rosa Herrera.
chooser.caregiverDesc: See the full caregiver view with logs, patterns, and the physician summary.
chooser.foot: You can switch between the two views any time.

patient.switchToCaregiver: Rosa's needs have grown — switch to caregiver view
patient.switchNote: As dementia progresses, everything Rosa logged moves to her caregiver, and more tools unlock.

switchConfirm.title: Move to caregiver mode?
switchConfirm.subtitle: A couple of quick questions before we hand things over.
switchConfirm.q1: Is Rosa needing more help with daily tasks than she did six months ago?
switchConfirm.q2: Should her caregiver now manage her logs, reminders, and routines?

caregiver.pastLogsHint: Grouped by date. Tap a day to see the details.

preview.fullVersion: This preview shows what shipping looks like — the demo is intentionally limited.

ask.title: Ask
ask.micUnsupported: Voice input isn't available in this browser.

mode.pinPrompt: Enter the 4-digit PIN to return to Caregiver mode.

auth.signInSubtitle: We will email you a secure sign-in link.
auth.linkSent: Check your email for a sign-in link.

onboarding.title: Set up your household
onboarding.biographyHelp: A few sentences about their life, family, and work.
onboarding.routinesHelp: Wake time, meals, walks, bedtime, etc.
onboarding.musicHelp: Press Enter to add each item.
onboarding.triggersHelp: Sounds, topics, or situations to avoid.
onboarding.photosHelp: Upload a few familiar faces. We will show these in Patient mode later.

today.title: Today
today.placeholder: Your daily log will live here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.editPatientProfile: Edit any field added during setup.
settings.caregiverWellbeingHelp: Optional check-ins about how you are doing will live here.
settings.editLockHelp: After this many days, daily logs and symptom entries become read-only.
settings.musicProviderHelp: Connect your family's existing subscription. We only store song picks — the provider streams the audio.

patient.subtitle: You are safe. Someone who cares about you is nearby.
patient.talkPrompt: I'm here with you. Take a breath.

welcome.title: COMPANION Care
welcome.tagline: A calm companion for people living with early-to-mid stage Alzheimer's or dementia — and the families who care for them.
welcome.caregiverDesc: Track days, spot patterns, and support someone you love.
welcome.patientDesc: A simple, calm place that's just for you.
welcome.demoInfo: A no-login walkthrough using a synthetic patient named Rosa. Nothing here is real personal data.

self.sleepPrompt: How did you sleep last night?

setup.title: Welcome
setup.lead: Just one quick question so we can set things up.
setup.name: Your name

music.noSongs: No songs saved yet. Add favorites in Patient profile.
music.noProviderHint: Pick a streaming service in Settings to play full songs.
music.notThisSong: Not this song — skip in future

learn.title: Learn
learn.lead: Short videos and one tip per topic. We bring the right lesson when a pattern shows up.
learn.thanks: Thanks — this helps the patterns get smarter.

summary.title: Physician summary
summary.subtitle: A one-page snapshot of what your family logged. Counts and dates only — never a diagnosis.
summary.clinicianSubtitle: Read-only summary of what the family logged. Counts and dates only.
summary.disclaimer: Counts and observations only, drawn from this household's logs. Not medical advice.
summary.concernsHint: Add anything you want to bring up at the next visit. We'll include these on the summary.
summary.medsDisclaimer: Medication names are listed for reference. The app never stores or shows dosing.

step1.title: Patient essentials
step1.lead: Just the basics so we can set up Patient Mode. Takes about 5 minutes.

step2.title: Routines & preferences
step2.lead: Helps us suggest gentle reminders and calm what upsets them.

step3.title: Background & care basics
step3.lead: A little life story plus care basics. None of this is shared without your okay.

dashboard.title: Set up the rest when you're ready
dashboard.lead: The app already works. Each section below can be done now, later, or skipped.

fields.addressAs: How they like to be addressed
fields.addressAsHelp: Mom, Dad, Mrs. Lee, Abuelo, etc.
fields.photosHelp: Faces they love. Shown in Patient Mode.
fields.caption: Optional caption — who, when, where
fields.musicHelp: Artists, songs, hymns, genres. Press Enter to add.
fields.greetingHelp: Record one warm sentence. Plays in Patient Mode.
fields.wakeMealsSleepHelp: For example: wakes around 7, lunch at noon, naps at 2, bed by 9.
fields.historicalRoutineHelp: For example: left work at 3 PM for 31 years.
fields.keyPeopleHelp: Name, relationship, and best way to reach them.
fields.lifeEventsHelp: Marriage, kids, military service, big moves — anything they tell stories about.
fields.stage: Which sounds most like a typical day?
fields.stageGood: Mostly good days — clear and engaged
fields.stageHard: Mostly hard days — needs a lot of help
fields.medicationsHelp: Names only — never dose or instructions.
fields.referral: Okay to refer you to nearby trusted programs?

guided.preferredName: What does {name} like to be called?
guided.addressAs: How does {name} like to be addressed? (Mom, Mrs. Lee, etc.)
guided.photos: Add a few photos of people {name} loves.
guided.music: What's a song or artist {name} loves?
guided.greeting: Want to record a short hello for {name} to hear?
guided.wakeMealsSleep: Walk me through a normal day for {name} — wake, meals, sleep.
guided.historicalRoutine: Any long-time pattern from before? Something they did for years?
guided.dislikes: What's one thing {name} doesn't want to do?
guided.keyPeople: Who's one important person in {name}'s life?
guided.cultureFaith: Any culture, faith, or background that matters to {name}?
guided.lifeEvents: Any big life event {name} loves to talk about?
guided.diagnosisType: What diagnosis did the doctor give, in plain words?
guided.stage: Which sounds most like a typical day for {name}?
guided.medications: What's the name of one medication {name} takes?
guided.referral: Okay if we suggest nearby trusted programs?
